questions: What files have merge conflicts that need resolution?
What was the intent of the ticket branch changes vs the staging branch changes?

answers.answer: Only one file has merge conflicts: src/tickets/index.ts, in the ticketsUsage() function.
evidence: .helix/merge-conflicts.json lists src/tickets/index.ts as the sole conflicted file

answers.answer: The ticket branch (HLX-342) changed <ticket-id> to <ticket-ref>, added [--json] to get, added a ticket-ref explanation footer, and used a dynamic exitCode parameter. The staging branch added [--mode <AUTO|BUILD|FIX|RESEARCH|EXECUTE>] to the create command usage string.
evidence: Conflict markers in src/tickets/index.ts lines 19-39 show both sides' changes

statement: Resolved merge conflict in src/tickets/index.ts by merging both the ticket branch's ticket-ref improvements and the staging branch's --mode flag addition. TypeScript compiles cleanly with no errors.
